svg.title: SCADA PR Review Tool — Updated Roadmap with Library Change Loop
svg.desc: Five-phase roadmap including automatic library standard learning and open PR impact dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about mining PR history from Bitbucket API')
g.text: Week 1 · Bitbucket API → extract diffs + review comments → embed into Chroma

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does auto-discovering SCADA standards from PR clusters work?')
g.text: Week 2 · cluster past comments → Ollama summarises → rules stored in Chroma

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I wire PR-Agent to Ollama with RAG context injection?')
g.text: Week 3 · PR-Agent + Ollama + RAG injection on each new application PR
SCADA system prompt: PubSub, event-driven, tag patterns injected every call

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the library PR learning loop work in detail?')
g.text: Ongoing · library PR approved → RAG auto-updates → open PRs re-scored
No cold start — library's own approved PR is the new standard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the impact dashboard show for open PRs?')
g.text: Week 4 · frontend shows which open PRs are affected by library change

svg.text: Everything runs on-premise — no code leaves your network
